creator: debdrup@freebsd.org
text:
Today trasz@ requested that I figure out a way to get added to the organization, as from here on out I'll be helping with the quarterly reports.

Since I haven't yet annoyed enough people to get a commit bit forced upon me, I assume it's okay to add me by my github username.

Also I'm including trasz@ for feedback on this, so he can confirm that he did request this.
